name: Riya Sharma
text: I reduced my back pain within weeks. The sessions are amazing!

name: Ankit Verma
text: Perfect combination of flexibility and strength training.

name: Neha Kapoor
text: I feel more calm, focused, and energetic after joining.

name: Karan Mehta
text: Highly recommend for beginners and advanced practitioners alike.I was always into sports, but had mobility issues. Sessions with Mam has greatly improved my mobility, and my body feels really relaxed even after a long busy day at work.
